title: Hex's Extra Structures
description: Adds a variety of new Overworld structures!
body:
**Hex's Extra Structures**, or HES for short, is a **NeoForge only** mod that adds, as you could probably guess, brand new structures! These include brand new dungeon variants and brand new structures for biomes that desparately need some, such as the dark oak forest. For maximum compatibility with other mods, the mod also doesn't add any new items and only uses vanilla loottables. ~~totally not because i'm lazy~~

If you would like to report a bug or suggest a feature, consider joining my Discord Server.
